summary.intent: Create a PR to migrate Tekton pipelines and tasks to ArgoCD management, then cleanup redundant oras-cli installation from the release-from-fbc pipeline after realizing it's already in the base image.
summary.outcome: Successfully created PR #2677 with artcd task and layered-products pipelines, and removed redundant oras-cli runtime installation from release-from-fbc-pipeline.yaml (ArgoCD will sync the change to the cluster).

repo: artcd task is new (2 days old) and needed ArgoCD management
doomsday-script-task and fips-pipeline-task are pre-existing (2+ years old) and already managed via ArgoCD
oras-cli was added to base container image in PRs #2674 and #2676, making runtime installation unnecessary
ArgoCD automatically syncs changes from YAML files to the cluster, so manual kubectl apply is not needed

code.finding: Removed redundant oras-cli installation step since it's now baked into the base image

workflow: Pre-commit hooks should always run (don't use --no-verify) to ensure validation
When using ArgoCD for cluster management, updating YAML files is sufficient - ArgoCD handles synchronization

friction: Initial commit used --no-verify and had to be redone to let pre-commit hooks run properly
